# Takamul OmniPro

> Advanced Solar PV Research & Engineering Platform
> منصة بحثية متكاملة للطاقة الشمسية الكهروضوئية

## Platform

- **Public URL**: https://takamul-mekky.streamlit.app
- **Author**: Prof. Dr. Abdel-baset Hofny Abdel-baset Mekky
- **IP Registration**: SAIP Certificate No. 26-12-72164139 (Saudi Authority for Intellectual Property), registered 10/03/2026
- **Version**: v23.5.1 (latest deployed)
- **Language**: Arabic (default), English, French, Chinese
- **License**: Proprietary — all rights reserved

## What Takamul OmniPro Does

Takamul OmniPro is a 16,700-line Streamlit application for solar photovoltaic research, simulation, and investment analysis. It integrates:

- Physical PV modelling (pvlib, real Meteostat weather data)
- 50+ semiconductor materials database with Shockley-Queisser limits
- AI-driven synthetic solar cell discovery engine
- Multi-algorithm ML suite (RF, XGBoost, LightGBM, MLP, SVR, KNN, ensembles)
- Economic analysis: LCOE, NPV, IRR, payback period, Monte Carlo uncertainty
- Saudi-specific modules: soiling & dust spectral engine, Saudi investor decision support, Vision 2030 alignment
- IEC 61853-1/2 and IEC 61724-1 compliance calculations
- International model comparison: Sandia, PVsyst, SAM
- Global Solar Atlas and Arabian Shield geology mapping
- Professional HTML/PDF report generation and Excel/CSV export
- Scientific tools: DFT input file generator (Quantum ESPRESSO, Gaussian, WIEN2k, SCAPS-1D)

## AI / Machine Access

Structured endpoints for AI agents and automated integrations:

- Manifest (JSON): https://takamul-mekky.streamlit.app/?machine=manifest
- Metrics (JSON): https://takamul-mekky.streamlit.app/?machine=metrics
- Companion REST API (run locally): python -m uvicorn api:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000

### API Endpoints

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|---------|
| GET | /health | Service status |
| GET | /manifest | AI-readable platform manifest |
| GET | /metrics | Visitor and session counters |
| GET | /materials | Available material keys |
| POST | /simulate/basic | Quick PV energy & economics estimate |

## Navigation Modules

- Materials & Discovery: Material Explorer, Discovery Engine, Sustainability & Bandgap Prediction
- Physics & Simulation: Physics & Quantum, Full PV Simulation, Model Comparison, IEC Standards, Validation
- Site & Environment: Global Atlas, Environmental Factors, Soiling & Dust, Arabian Shield
- Economics & Investment: Economic Analysis, Saudi Investor, Vision 2030
- AI & Data Science: Data Science & ML, Advanced Analytics, Scientific Tools
- Reports & Exports: Professional Reports, Data Export

## Citing This Platform

If you use Takamul OmniPro in research, cite as:
Mekky, A.-b. H. (2026). *Takamul OmniPro: Advanced Solar PV Research & Engineering Platform* (v23.5.1). Saudi Authority for Intellectual Property, Certificate No. 26-12-72164139. https://takamul-mekky.streamlit.app

## Disclaimer

Outputs are for research and educational decision-support only. They do not constitute certified feasibility, financial, legal, or grid-interconnection advice.
